base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_death_puff — a effect_layer (aura_vfx) from 1986 legend of zelda. white-cross spark. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame enemy-death puff — white-cross spark → larger-X → ring → fade. Plays over killed enemy sprite; drops random-item-from-pool (rupee/heart/bomb/key/fairy) follows

nudges.delta: fade. Plays over killed enemy sprite
